## Linked issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation

## Screenshots / screen recording

<!-- For UI changes, attach before/after light + dark. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `./gradlew ktlintCheck detekt lint test` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated unit tests where applicable
- [ ] Updated `REQUIREMENTS.md` and `CLAUDE.md` if the tech stack or scope changed
- [ ] Updated `docs/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md` checkboxes for any items finished
- [ ] No new third-party SDK without an explicit user opt-in toggle
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By: Claude` trailers on commits
